question: Paul gives instructions about praying or prophesying and mentions a practice involving a man’s head. What does he say about a man who prays or prophesies with his head covered?

choices.C: He is required to cover his head in every case
choices.D: He may cover his head only if he is a prophet

teaching.title: Head covering statement (men)
teaching.body: Paul explicitly says a man who prays or prophesies with his head covered dishonors his head.
